method: static code trace during discovery; no top-level validation phase run
evidence: User-owned web_push_subscriptions rows can carry endpoint text; web-push-reminders reads all rows with service_role and passes sub.endpoint to webPush.sendNotification.
proof_gap: Dynamic reproduction should confirm web-push library URL restrictions and Supabase Edge Function egress reachability.

method: discovery-time support facts only; no top-level attack-path phase run
source: authenticated table write to public.web_push_subscriptions under owner_all RLS
control: RLS checks user_id but no endpoint scheme/host allowlist or PushManager-origin proof is enforced server-side
sink_or_broken_control: webPush.sendNotification in web-push-reminders uses stored endpoint
impact: possible SSRF/outbound callback/provider-cost abuse from scheduled service-role worker
